Motel Resources

Motel Management Resources

We have organized the resources into the departments of a motel to allow easy navigation. The resources are created in Google Sheets or Google Docs - download or make a copy and use them.

Interested in becoming a Motel Manager

  • Do you need Experience or Qualifications to be a Motel Manager or Build a Career in Hospitality?

  • Your First 21 Days in a new Motel

  • Motel Management Handover Checklist for New Managers

Front Office Resources

  • Front Office - A quick guide to the day to day activities

  • Payment Method Notes

  • Virtual Credit Cards (VCCs) Explained

  • Securing Guest Data: A Beginners Guide

  • Front Office Checklist

  • Guest Check-In Checklist

  • Group Booking Management for Motels: A Beginner’s Guide

    • Group Booking Form

  • Reservations telephone call script

  • Allocating arrivals, shuffling rooms, free upgrades

  • No-Show/Cancellation Tracker

  • Petty Cash Record Sheet

  • Lost and Found Log

  • Turning away bad guests SOP

  • Rollover Template

  • Acronyms (Short form) used in Motels

  • End of Month Procedure Booking.com

  • End of Month Procedure Expedia

  • Guest Review Response Guide

  • Promotions & Discount Log

  • Reservation Enquiry Outcome Tracker

  • Corporate Booking and Credit Agreement

  • (Mock) Travel Agent Booking Confirmation

  • How to organize a Housekeeping team

  • 30 X 2 Minute Housekeeper Training Topics

  • Linen Order Template - How much linen should I store on-site?

  • Housekeeping Supervisor Room Inspection Checklist

  • Deep Cleaning Schedule (Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly)

  • Motel Common Area Cleaning Checklist

  • Lost and Found Log

  • Accessible room requirements - Australia, USA

  • Setting up a room for a guest in a wheel chair

  • Housekeeping Purchasing Tracker

  • Bedbug Response Guide

  • Housekeeping Wage Ratio Report

Maintenance Resources

  • ⭐Maintenance & Compliance Tracker - this combines Maintenance Tracker, Compliance, Asset Register, Purchase Tracker and Key Contractor Information into an easy to use central resource for managing your maintenance.

  • Weekly Maintenance Checklist

  • Monthly Preventive Maintenance Schedule

  • Annual Property Maintenance Calendar

  • Annual Property Maintenance Calendar Basic Version

  • Daily Property Walk Checklist

  • Motel Maintenance Troubleshooting Guide

  • Maintenance Troubleshooting Spreadsheet

  • Work Order Form

  • Contractor Sign-in/out sheet

  • Site Safety Briefing (QLD)

  • Site Safety Briefing (Australia)

  • Asset Register (aircon, fridges, TVs with install dates)

  • A/C Maintenance Checklist

  • Legionella Prevention Guide

Learn Motel Management in a structured motel course or GuestPoint Training Course. Not ready for structure - have read of our book: The Essential Guide to Motel Management.

Improve your Motel's Profitability.

Motel Coach

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
